title: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and re
latest_user_text: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and respond more like ChatGPT.
latest_assistant_text:
Certainly, Sir. I will retain your preferences from ordinary conversation where the system permits durable memory, and I will adapt to a more natural ChatGPT-like style while keeping the JARVIS discipline.

The practical version is this: I can use what you say to improve continuity, tone, and preferences over time, but I should still be explicit when something is only observed in the current thread versus genuinely stored. Housekeeping before poetry, as ever.

If you want,
